REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS YEE LAU AND YUQUING LAU'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE COMPLAINT PLEADS SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT A PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARE AVAILABLE, AT A MINIMUM, ON THE NINTH AND TENTH CAUSES OF ACTION. ATTORNEYS' FEES ARE ALSO AVAILABLE ON MULTIPLE CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT REQUEST NONRESTITUTIONARY DISGORGEMENT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2015 Set For Trial On Sep-12-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Defendants Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Oct-22-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS YEE LAU and YUQUING LAU's Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint is DENIED. The complaint pleads sufficient facts to support a prayer for punitive damages. Punitive damages are available, at a minimum, on the Ninth and Tenth causes of action. Attorneys' fees are also available on multiple causes of action. Plaintiff does not request nonrestitutionary disgorgement. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-22-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS YEE LAU and YUQUING LAU's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Plaintiffs may plead alternative theories of recovery. The complaint adequately alleges defendants' unlawful business practices. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Defendants Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Continued To Oct-22-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs YEE LAU and YUQUING LAU's Motion To Strike is Continued to October 22, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than October 1, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Continued To Oct-22-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs YEE LAU and YUQUING LAU's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to October 22, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later that October 1, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2015 Continued To Nov-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs YEE LAU and YUQUING LAU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint filed on July 13, 2105. Judge John K. Stewart, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs YEE LAU and YUQUING LAU's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint filed on July 13, 2105. Judge John K. Stewart, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
